name: Jan's German Apple Cake - Pjxg05a
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). Spray a loaf pan with Pam or other vegetable spray.
2. In a small bowl, beat together eggs, vegetable oil, and vanilla extract.
3. Mix all dry ingredients (flours, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and allspice) in a large bowl.
4. Add the liquid ingredients to the dry mixture and mix well until combined.
5. Fold in the chopped apples, raisins, and any nuts or seeds you may have on hand.
6. Spoon the batter into the prepared loaf pan, filling it about halfway full.
7. Bake for 50-60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack before serving.
